questions.question: What country is known as Schweiz in German and Svizerra in Italian?
What song has Roy Orbison asking the musical question: 'Are you walking back to me'?
What 20th-century decade gave the world aerosol insect sprays, Cheerios and napalm?
What do you call an angle more than 90 degrees and less than 180 degrees?
What cereal box informed Conor Bird that his dad Larry played basketball before he became a coach?
What stewed fruit dish do lunch-counter workers refer to as 'looseners'?
